steps.title: Recall the circle area formula
steps.content: The area of a circle is $A = \pi r^2$, where $r$ is the radius.

steps.title: Substitute r = 19 and compute the area
steps.content: Substituting $r = 19$ into the formula: $A = \pi(19)^2 = \pi \cdot 361 = 361\pi$ square meters. That matches choice D — D is correct.
